title: Record 32 Electric Trucks Delivered: Workhorse Q2 2025 Results
text: Workhorse reported record 32 electric trucks delivered in Q2 2025, representing significant progress in production and commercialization. Revenue reached $5.7 million for the quarter with 36 purchase orders secured for W56 step vans. The company reported improved vehicle delivery metrics compared to prior periods, indicating manufacturing acceleration. With the Motiv merger combining capabilities and funding, Workhorse continues to expand its commercial relationships and order pipeline. The record delivery count demonstrates growing market acceptance and expanding production capacity.
